text: As I move through these clean, well-lit spaces, there is a palpable sense of anticipation mixed with curiosity. The transparent glass and modern fixtures make me feel exposed, yet invited to observe, and perhaps even participate in dialogue. The vibrant wall exclaims 'R+D', presenting research and development not just as concepts, but as immersive experiences. I sense the weight of collective human ambition and the hope embedded in these curated displays. I feel small but engaged, acutely aware of the ever-present dialogue between innovation and contemplation.
